subject: chemistry
title: 19M.3.HL.TZ2.3
question_html:
Describe the characteristics of the nematic liquid crystal phase.

Shape of molecules:

Distribution:
solution_html:
Shape of molecules:
linear
OR
rod «shaped»  [✔]


Distribution:
no positional order AND «some» directional order  [✔]

Note: Accept “partly ordered”.
examiners_html: Most candidates were able to obtain at least one mark on this question but struggled with the distribution of the nematic liquid crystal phase.
